hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const f=(i.tool_input||{}).file_path||'';if(f.includes('.env')){process.stderr.write('BLOCK: .env.local es de solo lectura. Editá las env vars en el Vercel dashboard.\n');process.exit(2)}}catch(e){}})"
